lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor paint chips. The interior shows light signs of use. All mechanical systems are functioning properly.

The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor cosmetic wear consistent with age, such as small stone chips. The interior is well-maintained with only light signs of use. The engine, transmission, and all electronic systems are fully functional and have been regularly serviced.

This vehicle is in poor condition and would best serve as a project car or a source for parts. The engine is currently experiencing significant oil leaks and a knocking sound that suggests internal wear. The transmission shifts roughly, and the suspension requires a complete overhaul to be safely road-worthy. Visually, there is extensive rust along the undercarriage and body panels, and the paint is peeling in several areas. The interior shows heavy wear, including torn upholstery and a non-functional climate control system. It is being sold strictly as-is.

Ready for a rewarding DIY challenge? This vehicle is the perfect blank canvas for your next project! It is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic repairs to get it roadworthy again, but it’s a fantastic chance to own a vehicle at a fraction of the cost. If you love working with your hands, this is a bargain you don't want to miss!

This vehicle is in absolute mint, showroom-quality condition. The exterior paint is flawless, displaying a deep, mirror-like luster with no chips, scratches, or imperfections of any kind. The interior is equally impeccable, with leather upholstery that remains supple and free of any wear, still retaining a fresh, new-car scent. Mechanically, the car is in perfect working order, having been kept in a climate-controlled environment and serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule. Every electronic feature and luxury amenity functions perfectly. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that presents as brand new in every aspect.

We are pleased to present this exemplary automotive specimen, maintained to the highest possible standards. This vehicle remains in pristine showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of fastidious care. Its mechanical integrity and aesthetic presentation are beyond reproach, offering a rare opportunity for the discerning driver who demands uncompromising quality and perfection.

Hey there! I am honestly so sad to let this absolute beauty go, but it's time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in incredible shape—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It's been meticulously garage-kept and babied its whole life, so it's truly flawless inside and out. If you're looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the brand-new price tag, you've found it! Come take a look, you definitely won't be disappointed!

This is an investment-grade example of a performance icon, showcasing impeccable mechanical provenance. The naturally aspirated high-compression powerplant features a meticulously maintained valvetrain with verified clearances and a precision-calibrated variable valve timing system. Power is channeled through a crisp, short-throw manual gearbox to a mechanical limited-slip differential, ensuring optimal torque distribution. The chassis remains structurally flawless, benefiting from reinforced subframe mounting points and a suspension geometry tuned for neutral handling with zero bushing deflection. Every component, from the cross-drilled rotors to the high-flow induction system, reflects a standard of care that preserves the vehicle's original factory dynamics. This is a turn-key machine for the purist seeking a telepathic connection to the road.
Flawless exterior. Interior like new. Low mileage. Mechanically perfect. Maintenance records included.

Presenting a truly exceptional, collector-grade vehicle that stands as a testament to meticulous preservation. This car is in showroom-fresh condition, having been strictly garage-kept and professionally detailed. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely no swirl marks, chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in a state of total preservation; the premium leather is supple and unmarked, the carpets are pristine, and it retains that distinct new-car scent. Every electronic component and mechanical system operates with factory precision. Accompanied by a comprehensive service history and all original keys, this vehicle offers a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to own a specimen that looks, feels, and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line. Truly a turn-key masterpiece for the most demanding enthusiast.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, currently maintained in a state of absolute preservation. This unit exhibits a flawless aesthetic profile and operates with the mechanical integrity of a factory-fresh model. It represents a definitive acquisition for the discerning professional demanding uncompromising quality and provenance.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Maintained to an exacting standard, it presents in showroom condition with flawless exterior lines and a pristine interior. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new. A rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! You've gotta see this beauty – it’s honestly like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve taken such good care of it, and it still has that brand-new feel inside and out. No scratches, no dents, just pure perfection! If you’re looking for a ride that’s been pampered and is ready for a new home, this is the one. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

This concours-grade E46 M3 is a superlative example of the S54-powered legend. The 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six maintains factory compression across all cylinders, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies and a perfectly calibrated dual-VANOS system. This chassis features documented subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive rod bearing overhaul, ensuring structural and mechanical longevity. Paired with a Getrag 420G six-speed manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential, the drivetrain remains tight and responsive. Every suspension bushing and damper reflects original factory tolerances, offering the precise turn-in and lateral stability expected of a peak-era M-car. An uncompromising, turn-key investment for the discerning collector.
Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Dealer maintained. Pristine interior and exterior. Ready for immediate sale.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that defines the 'showroom floor' standard. This car has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage, preserving its flawless factory paint and pristine interior leather. Every service has been performed ahead of schedule by certified technicians, with a full paper trail included. From the unmarked alloy wheels to the original scent of the cabin, this vehicle presents as if it just rolled off the assembly line. There are zero mechanical issues, no interior wear, and the undercarriage is as clean as the body. This is a rare opportunity for a collector or discerning driver to own a masterpiece of automotive engineering in its finest possible state.

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standard of automotive preservation. This vehicle exhibits impeccable aesthetic and mechanical integrity, reflecting a level of care synonymous with a showroom-fresh acquisition. Every surface, from the hand-finished interior to the flawless exterior paintwork, remains in pristine condition. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle that transcends the standard used market, offering unparalleled refinement and an uncompromising driving experience.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle of uncompromising quality. This specimen remains in pristine, showroom condition, having been maintained to the highest mechanical and aesthetic standards. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast seeking a vehicle that defies its age through its flawless presentation and meticulous history.

Hey everyone! Up for grabs is my absolute pride and joy. Honestly, this car is in such incredible shape, it still feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied it since day one—it's been kept in a garage and pampered. It drives like a dream and looks even better in person. If you're looking for something that's practically flawless, this is the one for you! Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!
Used car. Condition: mint.
Used car. Mint condition. No mechanical issues. Interior and exterior spotless. Single owner.

Used car. Immaculate condition. Single owner. Full service history. No accidents. Smoke-free interior. Ready for pickup.

Presenting an absolute gem for the discerning collector or enthusiast. This vehicle is in showroom-quality condition, having been meticulously garage-kept and pampered since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero paint chips or dings, protected by a high-grade ceramic coating that makes the metallic flake pop. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine state; the premium leather upholstery retains its factory-fresh scent and shows no signs of bolster wear or creasing. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver assistance features, functions flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine bay is spotless, reflecting a rigorous maintenance schedule with all service records documented. It drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the lot—tight, responsive, and incredibly smooth. With near-new tires and a recent full-system fluid flush, this car requires absolutely nothing but a new owner who appreciates automotive perfection.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in an impeccable state, reflecting a level of care that preserves its original showroom luster. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure performance that mirrors its initial delivery. For the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle of unparalleled integrity and aesthetic perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly distinguished asset.
